name: TikTok Trend Intelligence API
description: Scrape trending TikTok videos, hashtags, and sounds via mobile proxy for trend analysis, influencer discovery, and content intelligence.
longDescription: Real-time TikTok trend intelligence: fetch trending videos from the For You page, discover trending hashtags and sounds, and get videos for specific tags or music. Powered by Proxies.sx mobile proxies (real 4G/5G IPs) to bypass TikTok's anti-scraping measures. Essential for trend forecasting, influencer marketing, content strategy, and competitive analysis.
whyMobileProxy: TikTok aggressively blocks datacenter IPs and requires mobile user agents for accessing most content. Mobile carrier IPs (4G/5G) mimic real TikTok app traffic, bypassing rate limits and anti-scraping measures. This is essential for programmatic TikTok data extraction at scale.

trending.videos: TikTokVideo[] — id, desc, author{uniqueId, nickname, avatar, verified, followers}, stats{playCount, likeCount, commentCount, shareCount, collectCount}, music{id, title, authorName, coverThumb, playUrl}, hashtags[], createTime, videoUrl, coverUrl, duration, isAd
trending.cursor: string | null — pagination token for next page
trending.region: string — region code (US, GB, JP, etc.)

hashtags.hashtags: TikTokHashtag[] — id, name, title, cover, videoCount, viewCount, trending

sounds.sounds: TikTokSound[] — id, title, authorName, coverThumb, playUrl, duration, videoCount, isOriginal

tag.videos: TikTokVideo[] — videos using the specified hashtag

music.videos: TikTokVideo[] — videos using the specified sound

vs.name: TikTok API (Official)
vs.limitation: Restricted access, requires partnership approval, limited data fields

vs.name: Apify TikTok Scraper
vs.limitation: Rate limited, frequent breakage, no mobile proxy rotation

vs.name: ScraperAPI TikTok
vs.limitation: Datacenter proxies blocked, no trending endpoint

competitive.ourAdvantage: Real-time TikTok trend data via mobile proxies at $0.01-0.02/request. Includes trending videos, hashtags, sounds, and hashtag/sound-specific video feeds. No monthly commitment. Bypasses TikTok anti-scraping with real 4G/5G IPs.

required.name: PROXY_LIST or PROXY_HOST
required.description: Proxies.sx mobile proxy configuration for TikTok scraping. Format: host:port:user:pass:country (semicolon-separated for pool)

required.name: WALLET_ADDRESS
required.description: Your USDC wallet address for receiving payments (Solana or Base)

optional.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
optional.description: Custom Solana RPC endpoint for payment verification (defaults to public endpoint)

optional.name: BASE_RPC_URL
optional.description: Custom Base RPC endpoint for payment verification (defaults to public endpoint)

requiredEnvVars.note: Mobile proxy is essential for TikTok scraping — datacenter IPs will be blocked.

limitations: TikTok may serve different content based on proxy region
Rate limited to 20 proxy requests/minute per client IP
Some trending content may vary by time of day
Sound URLs may expire after 24 hours

/api/tiktok/trending.description: Get trending TikTok videos from For You page

/api/tiktok/tag/:hashtag.description: Get TikTok videos for a specific hashtag

/api/tiktok/music/:soundId.description: Get TikTok videos using a specific sound/music
